The four Upachaya houses are really benefic and Parasari Rajayogas
are based on the same. The famous Parasari Slokas in this regard are
reproduced below for the information of the readers:-
Laksflmisthanam tn'konam cha vishnusthanam cha kendrakam
Tayo sambhandha matrena rajyogadikam bhavet
